records.ety: [F. despote, LL. despotus, fr. Gr. despo`ths master, lord, the second part of which is akin to po`sis husband, and L. potens. See Potent.]

defs: A master; a lord; especially, an absolute or irresponsible ruler or sovereign.
quotes: Irresponsible power in human hands so naturally leads to it, that cruelty has become associated with despot and tyrant.

defs: One who rules regardless of a constitution or laws; a tyrant.
